creator: doconnor@gsoft.com.au
text:
On 17/05/2011, at 18:50, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of net/netpipes,
>=20
> Please note that PR ports/157109 has just been submitted.
>=20
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>=20
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/157109

I've never used the timelimit binary in the port, I would be fine with =
renaming or not installing it.

I don't know if anyone else uses it though.

--
Daniel O'Connor software and network engineer
for Genesis Software - http://www.gsoft.com.au

are so many of them to choose from."
